_meta.description: Attribute Anomaly data: per-element base multipliers/proc structure and Disorder conversion rules. Values from community sources; several are PROVISIONAL pending in-game calibration (see DOCS/sources.md Phase 5 and DOCS/anomaly_plan.md).
_meta.conventions: mult is a fraction of ATK per hit/tick/proc (7.13 = 713%). 'hits' is the max number of procs over 'duration' seconds at 'interval' spacing (hits=1, interval=null for one-shot anomalies). supported=false entries are declared but rejected by calculations until values are measured. Disorder modes: 'procs' converts remaining time into ticks (+extra_procs); 'flat_decay' deals burst_mult decaying linearly to min_fraction over the anomaly's duration.

physical.name: Assault
physical.debuff_note: Inflicts stagger and increases Daze taken for a period (no direct damage-formula term).

ice.name: Shatter
ice.debuff_note: Freeze then Shatter; Frostbite increases CRIT DMG taken by direct hits (~+10%) while active - enter in direct-hit mode as an external CRIT DMG buff.

electric.name: Shock
electric.debuff_note: Procs when the enemy is hit; interrupts. Proc count/window provisional.

wind.name: Windswept
wind.debuff_note: 3.0 anomaly; damage values pending sourcing/in-game measurement with Velina. Vortex (Wind Disorder variant) resolves as the infused attribute's Disorder once measured.

disorder._note: PROVISIONAL conversion rules - calibrate in-game before trusting. Damage is dealt as the REPLACED anomaly's element using the triggering agent's stats.
